name: smeargate
why: Learned sigmoid gate blending each token embedding with its predecessor. Injects a cheap recurrence-like bigram prior. ~512 params. Used by 7 of top 10 submissions.
validates: Better val_bpb at matched wallclock from the token-blending prior alone.
falsifies: SmearGate without BigramHash is not worth the code change.
notes: Gate inits to sigmoid(0)=0.5, so starts at 50/50 blend and learns from there.
Separated from BigramHash to get clean attribution.
